mapper.sql: t_virtual_form.id, t_virtual_form.code, t_virtual_form.design_data AS designData, t_virtual_form.entity_id AS entityId, t_virtual_form.type, t_virtual_form.org_id AS orgId, t_virtual_form.create_time AS createTime, t_virtual_form.update_time AS updateTime, t_virtual_form.form_name As formName,t_virtual_form.note As note,t_virtual_form.doc_id As docId ,doc_document.`name` as docName,t_virtual_form.html_url as htmlUrl ,t_virtual_form.app_design_data as appDesignData

SELECT children.id FROM t_sys_org, t_sys_org as children WHERE t_sys_org.left_num <= children.left_num AND t_sys_org.right_num >= children.left_num and t_sys_org.id=#{record.orgId} order by t_sys_org.node_level ASC
mapper.select: SELECT t_virtual_form.* FROM t_virtual_form WHERE t_virtual_form.id=#{id} GROUP BY t_virtual_form.id

SELECT
,if(t_virtual_form.doc_id is null ,false,true ) as hasDocument FROM t_virtual_form LEFT JOIN doc_document on doc_document.id = t_virtual_form.doc_id left join t_eav_entity e on e.id = t_virtual_form.entity_id
,() AS ownedOrgIds
WHERE 1=1
AND t_virtual_form.org_id = ownedOrgIds.id
AND t_virtual_form.id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.id},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.code},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.design_data LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.designData},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.entity_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.entityId},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.type LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.type},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.org_id IN ()
AND t_virtual_form.create_time LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.createTime},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.update_time LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.updateTime},'%')
AND t_virtual_form.start_time >= DATE(#{startTime})
AND t_virtual_form.end_time <= DATE(#{endTime}
AND e.type_id = #{typeId}
And t_virtual_form.delete_flag = 0

SELECT t_virtual_form.*,d.`name` as 'docName',if(doc_id is not null,true,false) as 'hasDocument' FROM t_virtual_form left join doc_document d on d.id = t_virtual_form.doc_id where t_virtual_form.id = #{id}
